summary: Comprehensive testing of GTI Fleet Management System bug fixes - Iteration 5. All 7 bug fixes verified. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright automation.

minor.issue: approved_by_id, approved_by_name, approved_by_role fields are stored in MongoDB but not returned in API response due to MaintenanceRequest model having extra='ignore'. Fields need to be added to model.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/logbook with string country - returns 200/201 (422 fix verified)
POST /api/logbook without country - auto-fills from driver (works)
POST /api/fleet-managers as Fleet Officer - returns 403 (restriction working)
GET /api/dashboard/staff as Fleet Manager - returns country-filtered data
POST /api/logbook - tracks submitted_by_id, submitted_by_name, submitted_by_role when manager submits for driver
POST /api/maintenance-requests - tracks submitted_by fields when manager submits for driver
GET /api/pre-trip-checklists/today/{driver_id}/{vehicle_id} - returns completed=false when not done
frontend_ui_tests: Group Fleet Manager login redirects to dashboard
Staff Dashboard displays all stat cards (27 vehicles, 26 drivers, 6 pending maintenance)
Compliance Overview section shows compliance_rate, compliant, non_compliant counts
Pending Accounts section visible below compliance with 'View All' button
Pending Maintenance Requests section visible below Pending Accounts
Maintenance Requests page shows 'Submitted By' column with role badges
Logbook page shows entries including test entries
Pre-Trip Checklist page shows driver/vehicle selection
Driver sees Personal Dashboard with Safety Score, Quick Actions, stats
Driver Reports page shows 'My Reports' title (personalized)
Driver Pre-Trip Checklist shows 'My Pre-Trip Checklist' with driver auto-set

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add approved_by_id, approved_by_name, approved_by_role fields to MaintenanceRequest model in models.py to expose them in API response
seed_data_creation: Test logbook entries and maintenance requests created with TEST_ prefix to verify submitted_by tracking
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 bug fixes from iteration 5 verified: 1) Logbook 422 error fixed - country field now accepts string, 2) Pre-Trip Checklist auto-completion bug fixed - checkTodayStatus only sets status when completed=true, 3) Reports page personalized for Drivers/Users - shows 'My Reports' with personal stats, 4) Dashboard pending sections repositioned below compliance, 5) Staff dashboard stats working correctly for Fleet Managers with country filtering, 6) Fleet Officers blocked from adding Fleet Managers (403), 7) submitted_by tracking working for logbook, pre-trip, maintenance requests. Minor issue: approved_by fields stored in DB but not exposed in API response due to model configuration.

logbook_422_fix.details: POST /api/logbook now accepts country as Optional[str] instead of CountryEnum. No more 422 errors.

pretrip_auto_completion_fix.details: checkTodayStatus in PreTripChecklist.js now only sets status when response.data.completed=true. Vehicle selection no longer auto-completes checklist.

reports_personalization.details: Reports page shows 'My Reports' for Drivers/Users with personal driving statistics. Staff see 'Reports & Analytics' with fleet-wide data.

dashboard_pending_sections.details: Pending Accounts and Pending Maintenance Requests sections now appear below Compliance Overview with 'View All' buttons limiting to 4 items.

staff_dashboard_stats.details: GET /api/dashboard/staff returns correct vehicle/driver counts. Uses regex for case-insensitive country matching.

fleet_officer_restriction.details: POST /api/fleet-managers returns 403 for Fleet Officers. Only GROUP_FLEET_MANAGER and FLEET_MANAGER can create Fleet Managers.

submitted_by_tracking.details: Logbook, Pre-Trip Checklist, Fuel transactions, and Maintenance requests track submitted_by_id, submitted_by_name, submitted_by_role when manager submits on behalf of driver.
